answer:
{"tool": "python_exec", "arguments": {"code": "from sympy import symbols, Trapezoid, angle_bisector, asin, pi\n\
a, b, c = symbols('a b c', real=True)\n\
trapezoid = Trapezoid(a, b, c, h=(a + b) / 2)\n\
angle_bisector_intercept = angle_bisector(trapezoid.angle_a, trapezoid.side_c)\n\
ratio = c / angle_bisector_intercept\n\
print(asin(sqrt(1 - (ratio ** 2) / 2) / pi) / (asin(sqrt(1 - (1 / (1 + ratio ** 2))) / pi))"}}

(Note: The provided Python code uses the SymPy library for symbolic computation. If it's not installed, the tool call will fail.)
